Duplicate analytics — both Google Analytics and Matomo tracking running
Heavy inline JavaScript for form handling and cookie management
Specialized CPA platform limits customization and modern design

opportunities: Decades of experience — strong authority positioning opportunity
Also run Weston & Tuttle Wealth Advisors (wtwealthadvisors.com) — cross-selling opportunity
19 Yelp reviews with strong positive sentiment
CPA Site Solutions platform is limiting — custom build would differentiate
Deprecated Google Analytics setup means they are losing tracking data
Cameron Park location is growing market — local SEO opportunity
Tax + wealth management dual service is rare — should be featured prominently
100% Facebook recommendation rate from 8 reviews
research_data.pitch_angle: Your decades-long reputation and dual tax/wealth management practice are unique in Cameron Park, but a dated CPA template site with broken analytics is not capturing the full value — a modern site connecting both practices would be a game-changer.

notes: Independent insurance agency serving CA since 1919. Over 100 years. Functional but dated website. Minimal social media.

issues: Heavy JavaScript dependencies impacting load speed
Multiple tracking systems (GTM, GA, Heap Analytics) running simultaneously
Significant inline CSS hurting caching efficiency
Basic cookie consent implementation
reCAPTCHA adds friction to forms

opportunities: Operating since 1919 — 107 years of heritage is incredible marketing asset
Access to 350+ insurance companies — massive selection advantage
WordPress/Zywave platform is functional but heavy and template-driven
Two locations (Placerville and Georgetown) — local SEO for both
24/7 availability claim is strong differentiator
Positive customer testimonials but unknown Google review count
No Instagram presence despite strong community ties
research_data.pitch_angle: 107 years in business with access to 350+ carriers is an unmatched story in El Dorado County — your current template site does not tell that story or capture the local search traffic that a proper website and SEO strategy would deliver.

notes: Boutique spa on Main St. Hydrafacials, massage, chemical peels. Only 12 reviews. Small owner-operated.

issues: Wix platform limits medical aesthetics SEO capabilities
Limited operating hours (Wed/Fri/Sat/Sun only) not prominently communicated
Boutique positioning needs stronger visual branding
Medical services (Botox, filler, laser) mixed with spa services without clear hierarchy

opportunities: Only full-service day spa in Placerville — own that keyword
Hydrafacials + Botox + weight loss services = high-margin mix undersold
Wix limits ability to rank for medical spa keywords
Very limited hours (4 days/week) — needs clear communication and online booking
Groupon presence suggests price sensitivity — need to reposition as premium
No Instagram despite being a visual beauty business
research_data.pitch_angle: As Placerville's only full-service day spa with medical aesthetics, you own a market of one — but your Wix site and Groupon presence position you as budget when your Hydrafacials and Botox services should command premium pricing with a site that matches.

notes: WordPress Astra 2+ versions behind. Yoast garbage meta descriptions.

notes: Aveda Concept Salon under-leveraged. Gmail. 110 reviews.

website.platform: WordPress (custom theme, Instagram Feed Pro, Aura Salon Ware booking)
issues: Actually a solid WordPress site — well-designed and professional
Instagram feed integration working well
Booking system integrated (Aura Salon Ware)
Minor: could optimize for Core Web Vitals

opportunities: Website is already competent — harder sell for full rebuild
Aveda concept salon positioning could be stronger in local search
110 Yelp reviews but some complaints about scheduling — process optimization
Instagram integration exists but content strategy could be more medical-aesthetics focused
Lash lifts and facials represent medspa-adjacent services to grow
Could add dedicated landing pages for high-margin services (facials, extensions)
research_data.pitch_angle: Your WordPress site is solid but your 110 Yelp reviews include scheduling complaints that an AI booking and review management system would eliminate — plus dedicated landing pages for your high-margin facial and extension services would drive more of the revenue that matters.
